title: Adelaide Academic Excellence Scholarship
manual_review_requirements: Confirm that the applicant is an international student under Adelaide University's current definition.
Confirm that the intended CRICOS-registered bachelor's or master's degree satisfies the stated minimum duration after any credit or recognised prior learning.
Confirm that the intended degree is not one of the excluded programmes listed on the official scholarship page.
Confirm that the applicant is not an Australia Awards recipient.
Confirm that the applicant does not hold an international sponsorship tuition-fee waiver equal to or greater than the scholarship value.
Confirm selection by the scholarship panel because the award is competitive and places are limited.
eligibility_text: Adelaide University's Adelaide Academic Excellence Scholarship provides a 50% tuition fee reduction for commencing international students applying to qualifying CRICOS-registered bachelor or master coursework degrees. Applicants using GPA for assessment require a minimum overall GPA of 6.7 on a 7.0 scale or a comparable result. The official page excludes specified programmes, Australia Awards recipients, and certain sponsored students. Semester 2 2026 applications closed on 22 May 2026.
